template_data.label_above: Small business federal awards, top-8 industries Q2 2026
template_data.context_html: One quarter. Eight industries. Small businesses — not just the big primes.
template_data.image_prompt: Split-panel infographic on dark navy background. Left panel: bold label 'THE MYTH' with red X icon, short red label text 'TOO SMALL TO WIN'. Right panel lighter zone: bold label 'THE DATA' with green checkmark, large accent number '$12.1B' centered, sub-label 'Q2 2026 · 8 INDUSTRIES'. Center: illustrated professional man in business casual reviewing federal contract documents at a desk. Bold headline at top: 'SMALL BUSINESS WON $12.1B' in white caps. Bottom banner: short white callout 'ONE QUARTER · NOT THE YEAR'. Credit line: 'USAspending.gov'. Footer text: 'Jason · GSA Focus'.
